notes: For BG 6.24, the engineering layer does not conflate traditions. Shankara's Advaita reading and Ramanuja's Vishishtadvaita reading are presented separately with their distinguishing claims preserved. Sanskrit technical terms are preserved verbatim where load-bearing (yoga-yukta-ātmā, sama-darśana, brahma-saṁsparśa, niścayena, anirviṇṇa-cetasā). The two-clause practice: tyāga of saṅkalpa-prabhavān desires + mind-restraint of senses on every side. STRETCHED. Tools: PostgreSQL, GitHub, Twitter.. PASS.
